recommendations.title: Nails
recommendations.overview: Paralyzed after a terrible accident, Dana struggles to regain her life and family when she encounters a malevolent ghost in her hospital room.

recommendations.title: Demon
recommendations.overview: A bridegroom is possessed by an unquiet spirit in the midst of his own wedding celebration, in this clever take on the Jewish legend of the dybbuk.

recommendations.title: The Gallows Act II
recommendations.overview: When Auna Rue transfers to a prestigious new acting school, she encounters a malevolent spirit after participating in a viral challenge.

recommendations.title: Poverty and Nobility
recommendations.overview: Eugene, a young nobleman, asks two penniless idlers to impersonate his noble relatives to help him marry Gemma, the daughter of an enriched cook.

recommendations.title: Ghost House
recommendations.overview: A young couple go on an adventurous vacation to Thailand only to find themselves haunted by a malevolent spirit after naively disrespecting a Ghost House.

recommendations.title: The Binding
recommendations.overview: While visiting her fiancé's mother in southern Italy, a woman must fight the mysterious and malevolent curse intent on claiming her daughter.

recommendations.title: The Remains
recommendations.overview: After a family moves into an old Victorian home, they discover a chest in the attic containing antiques tainted by a malevolent spirit. As the antiques slowly possess each family member, the spirit grows stronger, hellbent on kidnapping the children.

recommendations.title: Dracula's Daughter
recommendations.overview: A countess from Transylvania seeks a psychiatrist’s help to cure her vampiric cravings.

recommendations.title: The Devil's Candy
recommendations.overview: A struggling painter is possessed by satanic forces after he and his young family move into their dream home in rural Texas.

recommendations.title: Stephanie
recommendations.overview: After a mysterious global crisis, a young girl is left alone to hide from a malevolent power that stalks her home. Her parents eventually return and the struggle begins to save their daughter.
